overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, likely from a survival video game. The camera moves cautiously along a dirt path bordered by a rock wall and dense vegetation, passing a large tree as it ventures deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dark forest path, staying close to the rock wall on the right side

entered.detail: large rocky cliff face running along the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail with scattered stones and patches of grass
mature tree with thick trunk and spreading branches ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail in a dark forest at night. A large rock formation runs along the right side while dense vegetation borders the left. The camera approaches a prominent large tree ahead on the path.

events.description: camera passes the large tree on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing past the large tree and proceeding deeper into the dark woods, leaving the rock wall behind

entered.detail: thick forest canopy and undergrowth ahead, barely visible in the darkness

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the large tree on the left and continues deeper into the forest. The rock formation on the right recedes into darkness as the path winds into denser woodland. The surroundings become increasingly dark and enclosed as the journey progresses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow forest trail that transitions from a structured path into an increasingly enclosed and oppressive woodland. It begins with a cautious walk along a dirt trail, flanked by a large rock formation on the right and dense vegetation on the left. As the camera approaches and passes a prominent large tree, the path begins to wind deeper into the forest. The rock formation then recedes into the shadows while the surrounding foliage closes in, shifting the atmosphere toward a more claustrophobic feel. Finally, the scene descends into deeper darkness as the camera ventures further into the dense, nocturnal woods.
